title: tithonia speciosa
intro: Tithonia speciosa, also known as the Mexican sunflower, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Tithonia speciosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
